title: hieracium bifidum subsp. oreitiforme
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. oreitiforme, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium bifidum subsp. oreitiforme are primarily attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Hieracium bifidum subsp. oreitiforme can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
